# CleanAlta Thailand - Professional Drone Cleaning
# Subsidiary of TELEPILOTE SAS (SIREN 938 788 510)
# https://dronecleaningthailand.com

## Services: Facade, Glass, Pure Water, High-Pressure (250 bar), Low-Pressure, Inspection
## Areas: Bangkok, Phuket, Koh Samui, Krabi, Chiang Mai
## Key facts: 40% cheaper than scaffolding, 1,500 m²/hour, CAAT/NBTC compliant, THB 2M insured
